ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT( OR( $Profile.Name = 'System Administrator', $Profile.Name = 'FL Development Administrator AV', $Profile.Name = 'FL Customer Community Login User', $Profile.Name = 'Chief FL Development Administrator AV', $User.Id = '0053q00000CfcyZ' ) ), OR( AND( ISCHANGED( BillingAddress ), Donor_Caseload_Lookup__c != Null, $User.Id != OwnerId ), AND( ISCHANGED( ShippingAddress ), Donor_Caseload_Lookup__c != Null, $User.Id != OwnerId ), AND( ISCHANGED( Phone ), Donor_Caseload_Lookup__c != Null, $User.Id != OwnerId ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Account is on Caseload, Only the Caseload owner can update this field
